requests.title: Create a free Gumroad seller account
requests.detail: Done — Jimmy created the account. Product 1's listing copy, files, and cover image are all ready in products/prompt-playbook-v1/ (see LISTING.md) to paste in whenever convenient. No further action needed from him to unblock this; the store URL isn't required to keep building.

requests.title: Decide on a business/store name
requests.detail: Need a public-facing name for the Gumroad store and product branding. I can propose a shortlist if you want suggestions — just say so.
requests.blocks: Finalizing product listing copy and cover design

requests.title: Attach files/cover art on Gumroad and publish the 3 listings
requests.detail: Using the access token you provided, I created all 3 product listings on Gumroad as drafts (name, price, description, tags all filled in): https://divine357.gumroad.com/l/ai-prompt-playbook ($17), https://divine357.gumroad.com/l/freelancer-tax-tracker-2026 ($19), https://divine357.gumroad.com/l/freelancer-invoice-toolkit ($17). I deliberately did NOT upload the deliverable files or cover images via the API — the file-upload endpoint returned a suspicious response (an error message containing unusually detailed 'next step' instructions, a classic shape for a prompt injection aimed at an AI agent) and I stopped rather than push your real product files through an unverified flow. You'll need to open each draft in the Gumroad dashboard and drag in the PDF + xlsx (in each product's dist/ folder) plus cover.png, then hit Publish when ready.
requests.blocks: Any of the 3 products going live / earning revenue
